entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being evaluated for resistance and tolerance to root-knot nematodes

entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE JAVANICA
entities.description: A species of root-knot nematode that causes infection in chickpea

entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE INCOGNITA
entities.description: A species of root-knot nematode found in mixed populations in farmer's fields

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a chickpea cultivar to prevent or limit the establishment of nematodes

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a chickpea cultivar to maintain growth and yield despite nematode infection

entities.name: NEMATODE INFESTATION
entities.description: The presence and activity of root-knot nematodes in the soil

entities.name: GALL NUMBER
entities.description: The number of galls formed on the roots due to nematode infection

entities.name: GALL SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the galls on the roots

entities.name: ROOT AREA COVERED WITH GALLS
entities.description: The extent of the root system affected by gall formation

entities.name: EGG MASS NUMBER
entities.description: The number of nematode egg masses produced on the roots

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: Reduced overall growth of the plant caused by nematode infection

entities.name: YELLOWING
entities.description: Chlorosis or yellowing of leaves resulting from nematode infection

entities.name: PREMATURE DRYING
entities.description: Early wilting or drying of the plant caused by nematode infection

entities.name: LEAF SHEDDING
entities.description: The premature loss of leaves due to nematode infection

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the relationship between nematode infestation levels and plant growth parameters

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: SHOOT MASS
entities.description: The dry weight of the above-ground parts of the plant

entities.name: ROOT MASS
entities.description: The dry weight of the root system

entities.name: POD MASS
entities.description: The dry weight of the pods produced by the plant

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The timing and occurrence of flower production

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach full development, categorized as early or late

entities.name: CALCIUM UPTAKE
entities.description: The absorption of calcium from the soil by the plant

entities.name: FARMER'S FIELD
entities.description: The agricultural environment where cultivars were tested under mixed nematode populations
